tspan.tspan: Ratchet probability. Sets how often ratchets

text.tspan: happen. The distribution depends on SEED.

tspan.tspan: Bernoulli gate filter. 0% lets all gates pass; 100%
Main gate pulse width. It sets how long the
arpeggio stays alive. At 100%, the gate stays
Arpeggio clock multiplier. It multiplies the main

text.tspan: clock and sends the arpeggio clock to Gina.
changing; fixed values make behavior repeatable.

tspan.tspan: Number of main pulses before starting a new
Arpeggio gate length. Controls the gate length
Random gate length reduction. Higher values
Swing delay amount. Delays selected arpeggio
Swing probability. Sets how often swing is

text.tspan: applied. The distribution depends on SEED
